headline: A Look At American International Group (AIG) Valuation As Shares Weaken Year To Date
summary: American International Group stock update American International Group (AIG) stock now trades at US$77.05, with recent returns mixed, up around 3% over the past month but down about 4% in the past 3 months and 9% year to date. See our latest analysis for American International Group. In the short term, momentum has cooled, with the share price down 2% over the last day and 3.9% over 3 months. However, the 3 year total shareholder return of 50.4% reflects a much stronger longer term...

headline: Diamond Hill Select Fund Q1 2026 Portfolio Update
summary: Broad US equity markets declined during the quarter, with the Russell 3000 falling 3.96%, while performance across the cap spectrum was mixed. Read more here.
